case_title: CHO WING LEUNG et al VS. TRACY LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEUNG, CHO WING FONG, SAU CHU AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, TRACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. AMY WONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE.ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFFS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, SAU CHU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, TRACY $378.80 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $528.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
